vet_server.note: 3 pre-existing warnings in server/stream.go about MarshalJSON() signature - not introduced by this milestone. Already documented in .factory/library/architecture.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the v2-prefix naming convention for server helpers: v2-specific helper functions in server/ (e.g., v2TokenPos, v2ConfigErr) use 'v2' prefix to distinguish from v1 equivalents.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature server-config-check-v2 introduced v2TokenPos and v2ConfigErr in server/opts_v2.go following this convention.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD guidance for enhancement features: when a feature requires enhancing existing test infrastructure before adding new tests, a test-enhancement → implementation → new-tests flow is an acceptable TDD variant. The 'Write Tests First' mandate should note this exception for enhancement/refactor features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature server-config-check-v2-positions required modifying existing test struct and loop before new test cases could be written. Worker deviated from strict test-first approach.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note that custom Unmarshalers handle their own field validation separately from strict mode. Strict mode catches unknown fields, but value validation (auth conflicts, duplicates, bounds) requires separate post-unmarshal checks. Workers building config validation should be aware of this separation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature server-config-check-v2 discovered this pattern: strict mode Unmarshal + separate validateConfigV2 function needed for complete config checking.

rejectedObservations.observation: Re-parse-for-positions pattern: re-parsing via v2.ParseFileWithChecks in pedantic mode provides token positions for post-validation error reporting.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: Pattern is implicitly documented in architecture.md under pedantic mode section, and the code itself serves as documentation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pre-existing go vet warnings in server/stream.go about MarshalJSON signature.
